description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ROS 2 CI that runs on push to ros2 and ros2/* branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use a ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple ROS 2 environments, including Dashing, Eloquent, Foxy, and Galactic, using their respective Docker images. For each environment, set up directories, check out the code, set up the ROS environment, and build and test the ROS 2 package.
